title: Line Following Robot
description: A two-wheeled robot that traces a black tape line on a white surface using an array of IR reflectance sensors. A PID controller running on an Arduino adjusts motor speeds in real time to minimise lateral error. We tuned the P, I, and D gains iteratively on a test track, learning how each term affects overshoot and oscillation. The final robot completed a figure-eight course without losing the line.
